217e6ba5ff7f1752ff218687 description:
hmm, you actually showed up, hm? was wondering when you would.

this is how things will work. FSO takes work, FSO completes work. you're not one of ours, but the client vouched for you, and that counts for more than you'd think around here.

first thing. there are two military flash drives out on the streets. correspondence, the boring kind, nothing you'd want to read anyway. find them, bring them to me, unaltered. i'll know. i always know.

back home you'd file three forms and pay a tax just to carry what you're already holding. out here nobody asks. i could get used to it.

everyone gets a first day. mine went worse than this one will. -M
217e6ba5ff7f1752ff218687 startedMessageT:
two drives, somewhere on the streets. intact, untouched. you bring them to me the way you found them. that part isn't negotiable.

try not to make your first day your last one. -M
217e6ba5ff7f1752ff218687 successMessageT:
both sealed. clean. you'd be surprised how rarely that's true out here.

the client's satisfied, which means i'm satisfied, which is about as close to a celebration as this office gets. and there's something moving under all this. i can feel the shape of it, not the edges. not yet.

go see Artem when you've a moment. he keeps a needle and thread for people i point his way. a fixer should look like one, and you're starting to.

coffee's cold. it's always cold. welcome to Section 1. -M
217e6ba5ff7f1752ff218687 failMessageText: you altered them, lost them, or decided not to come back. i don't need to know which. -M
16491cf28bbe9d2da977d3e7: Hand over 2 Military flash drives to Mae
b114f93d063681aba12ebd4e description:
the drives checked out. that part's done.

drives uncovered some intel, a few big names are going to cause chaos soon, out here chaos means operational interference. so we're going to intercept, keep operations stable.

there's four who are making the biggest plays throughout the region. take them out, take as many trips as it takes. if their guards get in the way, that counts too.

back home you'd need three signatures and a waiting period before anyone moved on a name like that.

the real contract's more involved than this. one thing at a time. -M
b114f93d063681aba12ebd4e startedMessageT:
four bosses. anywhere in the region, however long it takes. their crews count toward the side work if you want it.

come back in one piece. -M
b114f93d063681aba12ebd4e successMessageT:
four down. region's quieter, and a few of their people won't be reporting in.

the client noticed. funds are already routed, more than last time. there's a rifle in with it, an old bolt-action, the kind that won't miss. some say its magic.

beans ran out, so it's instant until the next courier. small price. you're moving up the list. -M
b114f93d063681aba12ebd4e failMessageText: the contract's still open. the names are still up there. find me when you're set to go again. -M
5811f04bdf941e9f4b01dcaf description:
you've earned the brief, so i'll lay it out for you.

the client is the LCCB. a scouting department. they monitor for things outside any channel you've heard of. one of those readings led them here to Norvinsk. they believe TerraGroup recovered an artifact their department searches for. designation: Golden Bough. i don't know much about those, but i have heard of them, there's a bunch of crazy people going around in a bus trying to collect them, what were they called? the LCB? no, that can't be right... the LCCB doesn't disclose much, needless to say.

ugh, this coffee is getting worse. here's the objective. there's a set of TerraGroup internal documents within the region somewhere. there's a few key locations where you can check, where it all started, other TerraGroup facilities, or you could get lucky with one of those rooms covered in markings, don't know much, but we need intel, ASAP. extract with them intact, if they're damaged they're useless. if they leave your hands before they reach mine, the operation's a loss.

one more thing. we've taken on interference these past weeks. almost like our presence here is tiresome, just like this coffee. assume the folders are being watched. -M
5811f04bdf941e9f4b01dcaf startedMessageT:
we need intel, ASAP, you know which folders to grab.

assume contact. move accordingly. -M
5811f04bdf941e9f4b01dcaf successMessageT:
intelligence secured. that's our first hard lead, and it points straight to TerraGroup.

the LCCB takes the documents from here. you and i keep working the ground. payment's routed. and there's a standing arrangement open now, paid in coffee. ask when you're ready.

logistics finally delivered a working espresso setup. i'm at operational capacity for the first time in a while. it won't change the job. it changes how i operate when doing it. -M
5811f04bdf941e9f4b01dcaf failMessageText: the folders are lost, or you didn't extract with them. the LCCB does not issue second attempts on intelligence this sensitive. stand by for re-tasking. -M
b51a0af7158318002eef9355: Hand over the TerraGroup Blue Folders to Mae
c6adfbbc9ed34ef836d81ee1 description:
we've unmasked the faction interfering with FSO operations within Norvinsk, and hate to say it, but i've heard of these guys, Black Division.

they're not paid guns-for-hire, not like anything you've seen before, they're the force beneath TerraGroup's 'benevolent' mask, waiting for the moment to strike. the LCCB pulled it off those folders you brought me, turns out TerraGroup keeps a whole unit for this exact thing, scrubbing anyone who they order them to, even their own scientists. now, they're after us. guess we've dug too deep into them.

i made a fresh pot before i called you in. thought it might help me say this better. it didn't, this espresso machine somehow left gritty bits in it, terrible. hold on, i'll request another.

would be real nice to have good coffee right now, but i'll tell you how it is, we've taken casualties. i'm not going to sugarcoat it, things are heating up in Norvinsk, it isn't just some objective in a briefing anymore, it's real, and it's here. are you still with me on this?

if you are, i'll lay out the plan, five of them, Black Division, wherever they're operating within Norvinsk, and if you can pull a rig or a plate off one of them, grab it for me, the LCCB wants to see what TerraGroup issues the people it sends to erase us. -M
c6adfbbc9ed34ef836d81ee1 startedMessageT:
five Black Division, any map they show up on. pull a rig or a plate if you get a clean chance at it.

they came kitted for us specifically, so don't treat any of them like a regular contact. they were expecting you. -M
c6adfbbc9ed34ef836d81ee1 successMessageT:
that's 5 less to deal with later. that'll piss off the suits for sure. let them notice.

you came back. i'm not going to give you an inspiring speech or some such, but you returned and it matters. the people who stay when it gets like this, that's a short list. you're on it now.

payment's routed, and i tucked a Labs access card in it. you'll need it for where this goes. just know that it ends where they're keeping the Golden Bough. i'd tell you to grab a coffee and rest up first, but mine went cold halfway through this message, so. take the rest anyway. you earned it. -M
c6adfbbc9ed34ef836d81ee1 failMessageText: they're still out there, which means we're still in the open, and i don't love that. the contract stays up. come find me when you can move again, just don't leave me hanging too long on this one. -M
c6adfbbc9ed34ef836d81ee1 completePlayerM: That's five less to kill later.
1e2d4fbd357f2d0554ea6208 description:
hold on, i need a sip of freshly made coffee for this. ah, that's nice, i'll need it for this brief, let's get to it.

the Golden Bough rests within TerraGroup Labs. TerraGroup has it behind everything they can throw at us, raiders on the payroll, not that obligation means much to them, and then what's left of Black Division dug in to hold the line. if TerraGroup gets to use what they're holding, the LCCB's stated that nothing we could do would change the outcome. i'll give it to you directly, TerraGroup suits will be able to do whatever they want to.

so we're closing the chapter, permanently.

i'm authorizing the Inner Circle. my own people, the ones who've been with me since before any of this. they were on call. they're on the way and they're breaching in weapons-free, everything in that facility is a target except you. stay clear of crossfiring and let them work.

run interference and eliminate ops inside while my people get to the Golden Bough, don't waver, and come back out alive. just one last time. -M
1e2d4fbd357f2d0554ea6208 startedMessageT:
TerraGroup Labs. the Inner Circle deploys when you do, weapons-free, you're the only exception, so mind the crossfire.

just make sure you intercept the enemy long enough that my people can secure the Golden Bough and extract. i'll be on comms the whole way. -M
1e2d4fbd357f2d0554ea6208 successMessageT:
the curtain has fallen. the Golden Bough's secured, the LCCB has what they came for and TerraGroup doesn't get to end the world on schedule. the contract's closed.

the Inner Circle's pulling out, you should pull out too, rest a while.

i'm not good at the part that comes after the work. so i'm not going to try, not here. check your inbox when you're back at the terminal. there's something i sent that i'd rather you read than hear me say.

this operation's wrung me out. i need about a gallon of coffee and a week of nothing. you earned the same. welcome to the short list, for good. -M
1e2d4fbd357f2d0554ea6208 failMessageText: looks like your beliefs wavered this time. the Golden Bough's still down there and the file's still open. when you're ready, we finish it. we don't have the option of leaving this one undone. -M
a30a95735582a2230f766c72: Eliminate Black Division in the Lab
